rule_text: This guide governs patient (DTC) materials. Language rules differ by audience: use "someone/people with dermatomyositis" for patient materials; "patients" is acceptable in HCP materials. Confirm the audience in every brief before writing.
intent: Match patient-appropriate, inclusive language to the intended audience.
summary: Use "someone/people with dermatomyositis" for patient (DTC) materials; "patients" OK in HCP; always confirm audience in briefs before writing.
